mdtools.failure_summary: The agent reached the bounded 8-turn cap without mutating the file; the expected 0.4.0 release section was still absent under both scorers.

hybrid.failure_summary: The agent reached the bounded 8-turn cap without mutating the file; the expected 0.4.0 release section was still absent under both scorers.

unix.failure_summary: The agent made one mutation but still failed the insertion task; the expected 0.4.0 release section was absent according to heading_tree, block_order, and block_text checks.

notes: An initial default 30-turn mdtools run was terminated after more than 14 minutes because no run bundle files had been created; the recorded measurement uses the explicit bounded axis above for all three modes.

The run.json bundle schema records model, executor, runs_per_task, thinking_level, and holdout_version, but not max_turns or request_timeout_seconds, so this summary records those axis values explicitly.
